FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

2x3 affine (local→parent). 2.5D/perspective out of scope (per spec).

dx float
dy float

Returns

Affine2D

TryInverseTransform(Point2, out Point2)

Inverse-map a DEVICE point back through this transform into the pre-transform frame — the hit-test mirror of Transform(Point2) (scale-aware pointer routing into Viewbox/zoomed content). False when the matrix is degenerate (a zero scale renders nothing hit-testable).

public bool TryInverseTransform(Point2 p, out Point2 inv)

Parameters

p Point2
inv Point2

Returns

bool
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
